title: SQL: conversion from decimal to varchar error
poc: select tr, cast(tr as varchar(10)) from (select 11.34555 as tr) as foo;
key_bug_features: casting decimal to varchar in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10,5) NOT NULL);
SELECT id, CAST(value AS VARCHAR(10)) FROM test_table WHERE value > 10.0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (description VARCHAR(20), amount DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO another_table (description, amount) VALUES ('Test', NULL);
